## Summary

What this PR does, in one or two sentences.

## Why

What problem it solves, or what motivated the change.

## Changes

- Bullet list of significant changes.

## Tests

- [ ] Added or updated tests covering the change.
- [ ] `python3 -m pytest` passes locally.
- [ ] If touching slash commands or skill, manually verified via `/wiki:<cmd>` in a real repo.

## Checklist

- [ ] Followed the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format for the commit subject.
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` if user-facing.
- [ ] Updated docs (README / USAGE / DESIGN) if behaviour changed.
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies introduced.

## Related issues

Closes #
